title: Sablayan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sablayan with a Z-Score of +3.83. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sablayan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is moderate at 7.3 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the heat wave's impact on the city.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
